## Summary

Describe the purpose of this pull request and the changes made.

If this PR addresses an existing issue, add a link: Refs #<issue-number>

## Checklist
- [ ] I have reviewed the changes for clarity and correctness
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable) — include changed files under `docs/`
- [ ] If adding a new process document, `docs/index.md` was updated with a link and summary
- [ ] If adding a new doc, update the issue template dropdown options in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/add-update-content-to-process-docs.yml`

## Notes for reviewers

Provide any context reviewers should know (testing steps, decisions, alternatives considered).
